mapper.sql: id, user_id, total_sign_days, current_streak, longest_streak, last_sign_date, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_sign_in_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_sign_in_stats (user_id, total_sign_days, current_streak, longest_streak, last_sign_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalSignDays}, #{currentStreak}, #{longestStreak}, #{lastSignDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_sign_in_stats SET total_sign_days = #{totalSignDays}, current_streak = #{currentStreak}, longest_streak = #{longestStreak}, last_sign_date = #{lastSignDate}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
